data.content: Scanned-agent import is regressed in commit c264551c9e0e. SettingsAgentsSection no longer passes an add/import handler into ScannedAgentsList, and the scanned rows only expose model toggles plus dismiss. As a result, users can select models in scan results but cannot register any scanned agent from that UI. Validation on an isolated archive of the reviewed commit: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run test passed; bun run lint exited 0 with one pre-existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx unrelated to this knot.
